description: You are a fleet operations manager preparing a quarterly fuel efficiency report using /home/ga/Documents/fleet_fuel_data.xlsx. Based on the 'Vehicles' and 'FuelLog' sheets, populate an 'Analysis' sheet for vehicles V001-V015 with columns for VehicleID, Make, Model, TotalMilesDriven, TotalGallons, TotalFuelCost, ActualMPG, EPA_Combined_MPG, MPG_Difference, EfficiencyPct, and NeedsMaintenance (labeled 'YES' if EfficiencyPct is less than 0.8, otherwise 'NO'). Include a bar chart on the 'Analysis' sheet comparing Actual MPG vs. EPA_Combined_MPG for each VehicleID. Additionally, create a 'Summary' sheet with the title 'Fleet Fuel Efficiency Summary' in cell A1 and fleet-wide metrics in cells B3 through B11, including total cost, total miles, total gallons, average actual and EPA MPG, the count of vehicles needing maintenance, and the IDs for the best and worst performing vehicles. Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/fleet_fuel_data.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: Derived from real EPA 2022-2023 commercial vehicle ratings
